headline: Azure Data Engineer | End-to-End Data Platform Builder | From Design to Production
value_proposition: I don't just design data architectures — I build, deploy, debug, and make them work in real environments.
professional_summary: Data Engineer specialized in Azure Data Platform with a strong hands-on mindset. Experienced in building end-to-end data solutions including ingestion, transformation, storage, and analytics layers. Proven ability to translate business needs into scalable data architectures. Known for going beyond theory by implementing real-world simulations and solving production-level challenges such as CI/CD failures, authentication issues, infrastructure deployment, and performance optimization.
core_strengths: Hands-on problem solving in cloud environments
Ability to connect business needs with data solutions

highlight_project.name: Azure Data Platform – End-to-End Deployment
highlight_project.impact_statement: Designed, implemented, and deployed a complete Azure Data Platform simulating a real enterprise environment.
what_makes_it_strong: Built full pipeline from ingestion to reporting
Used Infrastructure as Code (Bicep) for reproducibility
Handled real-world cloud issues (authentication, permissions, region constraints)
Designed scalable architecture with Bronze, Silver, Gold layers
Applied Delta Lake for optimized transformations

key_impact: Transformed large-scale operational data into actionable insights
Automated reporting processes, reducing manual effort
Identified gaps between planned vs executed operations
Collaborated with business and tech teams to improve data-driven decisions

education.program: Master in Big Data and Artificial Intelligence

work_style.statement: I validate everything by building. Once I implement it, I can explain it clearly because I understand the full process end-to-end.

interview_hook: If you want someone who not only understands Azure Data Platforms but can actually build and deliver them in real scenarios, that's exactly what I do.
